name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the lime gelatin in hot water according to package instructions.
2. Let the mixture cool completely.
3. Stir in the grated cucumber and onion.
4. Fold in the sour cream, cottage cheese, and mayonnaise until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold or serving dish.
6. Refrigerate for at least four hours before serving to allow the salad to set and flavors to meld together.
